settings.title: We Now Run Gentle Puppy Intro Sessions
settings.excerpt: A puppy's first salon visit shapes every one that follows, so we have built a short, calm session just for that.
settings.body:
A dog that hates grooming usually had a frightening first visit somewhere along the way. We would rather start the other way round.

The first few experiences teach a puppy whether the salon is a safe place or a scary one, and that lesson tends to stick for life. So we built a session that exists only to make that first lesson a good one.

What happens in the session

Our new puppy intro session is short and gentle. No full groom, just a friendly look round the salon, the sound of the clippers from a safe distance, a paw held, a treat, and lots of praise.

A rough idea of what we cover:

  • Time to explore the room and the smells at their own pace.
  • The clippers switched on nearby, but never used on them yet.
  • Gentle handling of paws, ears, and tail, with plenty of rewards.

The point of starting slow

The aim is simple: your puppy learns that this is a calm place where good things happen. The real grooming comes later, once they trust us. A puppy that enjoys these first visits becomes a dog that hops onto the table without a second thought.

Sessions are about twenty minutes and suit pups from twelve weeks once their jabs are done. Ask us when you book and we will find a quiet slot, away from the busier part of the day.
